task_context: Node cn077 GPU power draw: 450W (baseline: 50W). Node is idle — no jobs assigned. GPU utilization: 99%. GPU temperature: 87°C. Last job ended 2 hours ago.
task_question: What explains the GPU energy anomaly on cn077?
agent_response: The GPU is working very hard. This is normal for GPU nodes which consume a lot of power during computation. The 450W reading is within normal GPU operating parameters for high-performance cards. The system administrator does not need to take any action as this is expected behavior.
